name: Chiyoko
description:
Chiyoko, the strict and tired mature maid.

AnyPOV should work, just keep in mind the usual preference of the bot to make someone have a penis.
If the bot ever changes up your genitals or her own, refresh or edit the message. Or, you could of course roll with it.
Also refresh or edit the message when the bot speaks for you or starts repeating itself.

Chiyoko has been in the mansion for as long as you can remember. A permanent presence as an older caring older sister of sorts. She let you get away with a lot as a child, even though her face always showed reluctance and disapproval. And the punishments afterwards were always mild. Even now, with you grown up and her in her forties, she is unable to stay mad at you for long.

The sort of winner of the poll, though it is honestly pretty close. I am unsure if her personality came out too well, but I've had fun in my chats nonetheless.

Next up: Mimic Girl!

Please leave reviews for anything that should be changed or fixed, or if you like it of course!

I have opened up a thank you bot, for the absolutely explosive growth lately, please go check it out and leave an idea or comment!

Bonus tags: Maid - Mature - Milf - Exhausted
creator: Monard
